description_long: This is a dark blue beret-style hat with a soft, rounded, and slightly flattened profile. The surface appears to be made of a fabric material, likely wool or a wool blend, with subtle creases and folds that suggest a flexible, semi-soft structure. On the top, there is a small, shiny black patch or insignia, possibly made of plastic or vinyl, which adds a touch of visual interest. The hat lacks a brim and features a smooth, continuous crown that gently slopes downward toward the edges. The overall finish is matte with a slight sheen, indicating a well-worn but clean appearance. This type of hat is commonly seen in urban environments, often worn as part of a uniform or as a fashion accessory.
description: A dark blue, soft beret-style hat with a rounded, brimless crown and a small black patch on top. The surface is matte with subtle creases, giving it a flexible and comfortable look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded, sloping profile and the subtle creases of the dark blue fabric.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the small black patch or insignia at the center of the crown.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth, continuous curve of the hat and the absence of a brim.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the gentle taper and rounded back of the hat, with minimal surface detail.
